node.text:
We're celebrating 125 years of partnership in Egypt 🇪🇬 

From the first telegraph line in 1859 to today's #DigitalTransformation – we're proud to celebrate over a century of collaboration and shared progress.

Together, we're supporting Egypt's Vision 2030 by:

→ Delivering 14.4 GW through landmark Mega Power Plants to strengthen energy security
→ Developing Egypt’s first 2,000 km high-speed rail network to advance smart mobility
→ Enabling smart infrastructure and Industry 4.0 to accelerate digital transformation
→ Establishing a strategic global R&D hub advancing digital engineering, #IndustrialAI, and #DigitalTwin technologies

With more than 2,000 colleagues across Egypt, we remain committed to shaping a sustainable, resilient, and digitally enabled future.

node.text:
♻️ Giving electronics a second life. 

Waste is a big challenge in electronics. Nora Jeske is tackling it with solutions for reuse, recycling, and extending component life plus smart thermal management and environmental data collection. 

Nora was awarded #InventorsOfTheYear in the Newcomers category for her #sustainability-driven innovations. 🏆

Keeping a kinetic landmark in motion takes more than design – it takes expertise.

🇨🇿 The Head of Franz Kafka sculpture by @cerny.david is a well-known tourist attraction in Prague. The 42-layer dynamic statue move seamlessly round the clock, thanks to a technical upgrade we carried out, together with @deusautomation.

What we focused on:
🟣 Repairing and fine-tuning the existing system
🟣 Reusing most components through a careful reconstruction
🟣 Improving control and #synchronization of the moving layers
🟣 Achieving measurable energy savings along the way

Now, thanks to our technology, the Prague marvel will keep turning heads for years to come – powered by innovation, #precision, and creativity.

@hd.hyundai has selected our #SiemensXcelerator portfolio to create an integrated digital shipbuilding platform powered by our #DigitalTwin technology, #AI, and Digital Twin Composer software. 🚢 

The platform builds an #IndustrialMetaverse environment where teams can test and refine shipyard processes virtually before implementing them on-site.

The goal is to eliminate data gaps, improve collaboration, and support complex projects across global shipyards.

Implementation starts in 2026.

📷 HD Hyundai Heavy Industries’ Ulsan Shipyard (Image courtesy of HD Hyundai)

€3 billion record investment: 90-year-old S-Bane can run every 90 seconds ⏰ 

Together with @stadler_rail, we will deliver 226 fully automated trainsets to Copenhagen's S-Bane network 🚄 

We're delivering Grade of Automation 4 to the world's largest open railway system, enabling fully driverless operation. 

The impact for commuters: 
→ 35% more departures 
→ 10 million additional journeys annually

We're also upgrading the entire 170-kilometer network with advanced signaling for full #Automation by 2033.

node.text:
This #ValentinesDay, it’s all about powerful connections — tech-powered ones. ⚡💜

Pause the reel to find your Tech Valentine.

Who did you land on? 👀

node.text:
What do we have in common with Tina Turner and Beyoncé? 🎤

We've all taken the stage at Munich's Olympic Hall.

For decades, we've brought our shareholders together at our Annual Shareholders' Meeting - one of Germany's largest shareholder events. And this year was a bit different... 🏟️ 

With 800,000+ shareholders globally, it's all about #transparency and engagement. 🤝

node.text:
Industrial AI is transforming factories, grids, and buildings.

At our 2026 Annual Shareholders' Meeting, CEO @roland.busch shared our strategy: scaling digital business, expanding in key markets, and making #IndustrialAI the core of industrial transformation.

The results are already visible: @PepsiCo turns months of work into days with our Digital Twin Composer. @Audi and @BMW are improving production quality.

With unmatched industrial data, deep engineering expertise, and partners like @Microsoft and @NVIDIA, we're building the AI operating system for industry.

#TechnologyWithPurpose #DigitalTransformation #AI

node.text:
Industrial machines speak different languages. How do we fix it? 

Enter Workflow Canvas, a platform by Zhen Hua Zhou that translates #IT and #OT systems into one universal language, making production smarter and connected across industries. 

For this groundbreaking innovation, Zhou was honored as an Inventor of the Year 2025 in the category Newcomer. 🏆

node.text:
🚂 Electric trains in 1879?

At the @deutschestechnikmuseum Berlin, we took a seat on the replica of the first electric-powered passenger train. Back then, steam ruled the rails… and this was a radical leap forward.

It didn’t stop there. Early telegraphs, rail communication, safety alerts — we kept pushing what rail could be.

We didn’t just dream the future — we built it. And now you can sit on it.

node.text:
A robotic hand that learns like a human powered by #SiemensXcelerator. 🤖

Built fully in the virtual world, trained through haptic feedback, and capable of adaptive, human‑like skills, this breakthrough in #PhysicalAI shows how our researchers make robotics truly programmable and scalable for the future of #IntelligentIndustries.

What if your building could think ahead? 🧠 
Adjust in real time?
And optimize energy without anyone noticing?

That’s exactly what autonomous buildings do. Quietly powering comfort, #safety, and #efficiency — all day, every day.

node.text:
HVAC installation simplified with an intuitive app that cuts setup from days to under 30 minutes. 

Jibo Liu, Steven Brens, and Sandeep Billa developed a patented mobile app that is boosting #efficiency, saving energy, and transforming an entire industry. 

They were awarded #InventorsOfTheYear 2025 in the Outstanding Invention category for this smart solution. 🏆

node.text:
@HaddyLife joined us right at the start of its journey as a small start‑up.

Today, they’re producing furniture and decorative elements for one of the world’s most iconic brands: The Walt @Disney Corporation. ✨ 

Discover how they are using our #SiemenXcelerator portfolio to make its operations more efficient, precise and sustainable — from boats and architectural molds to furniture, décor and more.

By embracing Industrial AI, Haddy is taking their manufacturing process to the next level.

Clean water, anytime and anywhere. 💧 

@wayout's microfactory fits in a shipping container and produces 22,000 liters of safe drinking water daily - enough for 11,000 people.

Our edge computing and #DigitalTwin technology automate the entire process, from purification to real-time monitoring.

The result: lower production costs, minimal waste, and clean water that's more affordable and accessible.

node.text:
Trail mix meets tech! 🥜 🌰 🥭 
In Ulm, Germany, @seeberger_1844 produces nuts and dried fruits, enjoyed in over 60 countries.

With #SiemensXcelerator technologies, they connect machines and data to run seamlessly and more efficiently.

Smart building automation controls heating, ventilation, and lighting - balancing energy use like a perfectly mixed trail mix.

Cloud-based analytics help them spot inefficiencies fast, improving performance and reducing waste.

And regular updates keep operations secure and reliable, so production never stops.

From factory floor to mountain peak: technology keeps the snacks flowing and adventurers fueled.

What's your go-to trail snack? 🥾

We heard 2026 is the new 2016 😅 

A decade can change so much, and the best stories are always the ones we share. Today, as you know, we are leading the charge in delivering #AI for industry. 😉 

What's your favorite transformation story from the past decade?

node.text:
Factories generate massive amounts of data, but most of it goes unused. Julian Senoner and Bernhard Kratzwald saw an opportunity to unlock that potential. 

Their invention, EthonAI’s Manufacturing Analytics System (MAS), integrates data sources to improve #quality and #efficiency at scale. With no-code tools, MAS delivers up to 80% less scrap, 25% increase in operator efficiency, and 5–10x ROI helping manufacturers achieve operational excellence. 

For this breakthrough, Julian and Bernhard were awarded the Open Innovation category of #InventorsOfTheYear 2025. 🏆

🚅 Battery trains powering green mobility transition! 
Together with the Danish operator @midtjyskejernbaner, we’re celebrating a historic milestone for Denmark’s shift to clean mobility. 

Inaugurated by H.M. King Frederik of Denmark, our Mireo Plus B battery trains are now entering passenger service in West Jutland, Denmark, replacing older diesel fleets and accelerating cleaner rail travel on regional routes. 

The outcomes: 

🟢 #Decarbonization without waiting for full route electrification 
🟢 Cleaner, quieter rail for local communities and an enhanced passenger experience 
🟢 A scalable model for #sustainable regional transport across Europe 

For Midtjyske Jernbaner, it’s a major step towards the ambition of becoming Denmark’s greenest railway. For Europe, a blueprint to decarbonizing regional rail. 🌍

node.text:
Paradeco Coffee Roasters in St. Pete, Florida, is more than just a great coffee spot – it’s a showcase of #sustainable, tech-driven design. ☕ 

With our technology, Haddy 3D-printed the premises’ entire counter (front and back bar) and key elements of the shop’s built environment, proving how local, advanced #manufacturing can shape unique and functional spaces.

node.text:
Bringing new treatments to patients faster.

That’s the challenge—and the goal.

Susanne Seitz, CEO of Smart Infrastructure Buildings, and Axel Lorenz, CEO of Digital Industries Process Automation, reveal how holistic solutions in #LifeSciences help streamline production and speed up the journey to treatment.

node.text:
Some things don’t seem to belong together — until they’re combined to create something brilliant. 

Together with Fraunhofer, we combined precise direct drives with robust indirect drives to create hybrid drives for robots. The result? Robots with both power and precision that can handle #3Dprinting and milling in one system. 

Congrats to Sven Tauchmann, David Bitterolf, Stephan Hansen, and Tobias Hamann, winners of #InventorsOfTheYear Award 2025 in Open Innovation! 🏆

node.text:
German words 🤝 endurance training 🏋️‍♂

Today’s challenge: Gebäudebestandsoptimierung

Translation: #AI helps buildings cut energy waste and costs. 24/7 sensors combined with smart data results in better decisions.

Got a German tech word we should decode next? 👇

Virtual PLCs. Industrial AI. Real‑time insights. 
 
@audi is transforming its production environment into a flexible, software‑defined system. The virtual #PLC is giving teams the ability to roll out features instantly and scale capacity based on demand.
 
Industrial AI models run directly on the shop floor using Industrial Edge, helping identify defects faster and boost quality. With #IT and #OT fully connected, Audi now has a production system that’s easier to maintain, quicker to update, and ready to deploy across global plants.
 
Together, we're entering a new era of automotive manufacturing 🤝

node.text:
♟️ In chess, thinking ahead wins the game. In industry, it builds resilience.

What if a plant could anticipate issues hours in advance, not seconds? With #PredictiveControl Solutions, powered by #ModelPredictiveControl (MPC) and #DigitalTwins, that’s exactly what’s happening in the process industry. 

Plants run smoother, waste less, and adapt faster. For this groundbreaking work, Dr. Pfeiffer was awarded a Lifetime Achievement Award of #InventorsOfTheYear 2025.

node.text:
Fusion is the technology of our generation - and Commonwealth Fusion Systems is leading the way.

By partnering with Siemens, CFS is building the digital backbone needed to design and manufacture an entirely new energy industry. With advanced design software and a connected data foundation, they’re accelerating the development of fusion machines that promise clean, safe, and nearly limitless energy for generations to come.

Listen to our interview with Joe Paluska, Chief Marketing Officer at CFS, to hear how we're shaping the future together.

node.text:
We brought together Siemens’ Member of the Managing Board, Chief Technology Officer & Chief Strategy Officer Peter Koerte, and Martyn Mallick, Vice President of Corporate Partnerships and Business Development at Amazon, to explore how we're accelerating real-world impact with industrial AI.

By combining Siemens’ deep industrial expertise with Amazon’s cloud and AI capabilities, we’re bringing industrial AI to life - unlocking value from factory floors to global supply chains.

We're proud of how this partnership is turning bold ideas into real‑world impact 🚀

node.text:
Digital twin technology brings the factory floor into the virtual world⚙️

PepsiCo and Siemens are reimagining U.S. manufacturing and warehouse facilities with high‑fidelity 3D digital twins. Using Siemens Digital Twin Composer and NVIDIA Omniverse, teams can test, validate and refine new configurations before any physical changes.

The result is a unified, real‑time view of operations built to integrate AI‑driven capabilities over time.

This virtual‑first approach that enables faster innovation, smarter decisions, and scalable, future‑ready operations🌍

node.text:
Together with NVIDIA, we’re building the Industrial AI Operating System for the real world.

From photorealistic digital twins, like HD Hyundai’s hydrogen-powered ship with 7 million parts, to AI-driven factories, we’re redefining how products are designed, built, and run.

With our industrial AI technology and deep domain know-how and NVIDIA’s accelerated computing and AI expertise, this partnership is unlocking the next era of digitalization.

node.text:
In his keynote speech at #CES2026, CEO Roland Busch showed how Siemens is bringing AI into the real world. 

Joined on stage by @microsoft , @nvidia , @pepsico , and @cfs.energy , we showcased how unmatched industrial data, deep domain expertise, and powerful global partnerships are transforming industries worldwide. 

This is real-world impact, at speed and at scale.

What does Industrial AI look like in action? 

In his keynote address at #CES2026, President and CEO Roland Busch shared how we’re accelerating the industrial AI revolution. 

Joined onstage by @microsoft , @nvidia , @pepsico , and @cfs.energy, we revealed how unmatched industrial data, deep domain know-how, and global partnerships are driving this transformation. 

From the launch of our Digital Twin Composer to adaptive factories, breakthroughs in life sciences, and clean energy, we’re bringing AI into the real world at speed and at scale.

#Engineering is stepping out of the screen.

Immersive tools powered by #AI and #DigitalTwins let you explore, test, and refine ideas in real time — no handovers, no delays.

It's a faster, smarter way to create.

What's one part of the design process you wish you could see in 3D before building?

Factories, buildings, machines: #AI is entering the real world.

At #CES2026 in Las Vegas, our CEO Roland Busch will take the stage with Jensen Huang (@nvidia), Jay Parikh (@microsoft), Dr. Athina Kanioura (@pepsico), and Bob Mumgaard (@cfs.energy Commonwealth Fusion Systems).

Together, they will share how we are powering the #IndustrialAI revolution.

📅 Tuesday January 6, 9:00 a.m. PST

You'll see real-world examples from customers already transforming their operations, making them more efficient, resilient, and sustainable.

After the keynote, join our Industrial AI HQ panel with Siemens and Amazon Web Services (@amazonwebservices ) leaders for a deeper discussion on what these announcements mean for the future of industry.

Watch live at the link in bio!

node.text:
Try saying Künstlicheintelligenzanwendungen three times fast 🧐

Or just call it what it is: #AI Applications

We use #IndustrialAI to keep factories running smoothly. Sensors track vibration and temperature around the clock, spotting tiny patterns that signal trouble before it happens.

So machines can get fixed during planned breaks, not emergency shutdowns.

What long German tech word should we decode next? 👇

Stronger AI starts with real-world experience 💪 

Our Executive Vice President for Data and AI, Vasi Philomin, shares why a century of industrial know-how gives us the edge in #IndustrialAI.

It’s experience, scale, and data - working together.

node.text:
Quality inspection just got faster. ⏩ 

We deployed an AI-powered vision system at @Audi for real-time weld spatter detection in car body construction.

The impact? Higher car body quality, faster production rates, and safer working conditions.

This is #IndustrialAI meeting real-world manufacturing challenges with #SiemensXcelerator.

Managing peak demand at #EVcharging stations just got smarter.

When EV charging stations face sudden surges — like during major events — costs can spike and grids can strain.

Electrification X uses intelligent load management to optimize power distribution in real time.

The impact: lower operating costs, no grid upgrades needed, and a more stable energy system.

Scalable technology that makes #EnergyTransition work for everyone.

#SmartGrid

What connects New York, Berlin, Manchester, and Kaohsiung? 🌍 

Our technology.

We’re keeping millions moving, powering smart districts, driving clean energy and keeping communities connected.

Different cities. Different challenges. One purpose: To create technology to transform the everyday, for everyone.

node.text:
Automation is everywhere — from the clothes we wear to the machines that make them.

How do industries tackle labor shortages, supply chain issues & #sustainability?
👉 With software-defined automation + #AI — enabling smarter, flexible production.

As Rainer Brehm, COO for automation business and CTO Siemens Industry says: It’s the game-changer for tomorrow.

This might look like a scene from Breaking Bad 🧪

But it's actually cutting-edge science.

We filled a lab with fog, used lasers to reveal air patterns, and precisely tracked particles with a network of specialized sensors, including those from the University of Applied Sciences and our own Siemens devices. We then tested three ventilation systems to answer one question: which one actually keeps researchers safe while using less energy?

Project PEARL revealed dramatic differences.

One system removed contaminants 29% faster in critical zones and needed 45% less air to maintain safe conditions.

We measured everything from particle removal speed to thermal comfort using real heat loads and smart sensors.

This data is helping us design safer, more #Sustainable laboratories for real scientific discovery.

What's the most important factor in your lab: speed of contaminant removal or energy savings?

node.text:
Planning a trip to Prague? This landmark will have your head spinning 👀

But how does this statue actually work? #FranzKafka’s iconic rotating head, by Czech artist David Černý, recently got an update. Together with Deus Automation, we spent 6 months servicing motors and upgrading the rotation components, ultimately cutting energy use.

This means Kafka’s head will keep turning for at least another 20 years, more efficient, reliable, and #Sustainable than ever. 🌀♻️

Behind every fast lap is thousands of data points, simulations and decisions.

Since the summer break, Max and @redbullracing engineered an incredible comeback and fought until the final race of the season.

Siemens is proud to support the technology powering that performance. 🏁

#DigitalPerformance #RedBullRacing #F1 #Teamwork #Engineering #OracleRedBullRacing #F1Technology #DigitalTwin

Our 2025 Wrapped is here!

This year, we learned, innovated, and grew together. Curious about what made the top of the list? 👀
 
From bold ideas to unforgettable moments, these highlights show what mattered most to YOU in 2025.
Thank you for being part of this incredible journey. 

What was your favorite moment with us this year? Share it below! 👇

node.text:
With a comprehensive #DigitalTwin, customers can simulate almost everything. As Tony Hemmelgarn, President and CEO of Digital Industries Software, says: this turns complexity into a competitive advantage. 🚀 

Unified under #SiemensXcelerator, these capabilities help customers move faster, decide smarter, and deliver better with confidence.

Our Sustainability Statement 2025 is out! ✅ 

It brings together strategy, governance, operational execution, and performance management, illustrating how sustainability is embedded across the organization.

We're turning our strategic priorities into measurable actions across three impact areas, built on a foundation of Ethics & governance: 

🌍 Decarbonization and energy efficiency 
♻ Resource efficiency and circularity 
🤝 People centricity and society 

From #Decarbonization solutions to #Circularity to training over 1 million people in sustainability and digitalization skills - we're proving that #TechnologyWithPurpose delivers real outcomes. 

What sustainability metric matters most to your organization? 

#ScalingSustainabilityImpact

Our headquarters is glowing purple tonight! 💜

Around the world, we’re proud to join the #PositivelyPurple movement—celebrating the contributions of persons with disabilities and reaffirming our commitment to creating an inclusive workplace where accessibility and full participation spark innovation, and real conversations drive change.

Together, let’s turn awareness into meaningful action. 🌍
#IDPD #DisabilityInclusion

node.text:
Ahead of International Day of Persons with Disabilities tomorrow, we’re shining a spotlight on #Neurodiversity — because when every mind is valued, innovation thrives.

See how Megan has learned to embrace her #ADHD and thrive.

node.text:
The world's first failsafe virtual controller? Yes!
Controllers are the brains of factories, and we just moved them to the cloud.

Our virtual #PLC is running production at the @audi factory in Germany.
No more hardware boxes.
Just software that updates centrally, scales instantly, and adapts in real time.
This is #SmartManufacturing powered by our #SiemensXcelerator portfolio.
Building a greener future, one location at a time! 🌍🐝 Our commitment to sustainability shines through in how we transform our own real estate. #ScalingSustainabilityImpact

node.text:
We’re on the pulse of EV charging innovation! ⚡ 

We’re deploying our Electrification X to boost efficiency and safety across 300+ @aral_allessuper EV charging stations in Germany. 

Imagine 3,000+ ultra-fast chargepoints, optimized and secured in real-time! 🚀

node.text:
5 things in our HQ that just make sense ☀

Right in the heart of Munich 🇩🇪, our headquarters brings smart design and sustainability together—green spaces, energy-saving solutions, and views that inspire every workday.

What’s your favorite workplace feature?

node.text:
What's the difference between #AI factories and traditional #DataCenters? 📊 

Ruth Gratzke, President & CEO of Siemens Industry, Inc. US, breaks down the unique challenges that come with AI-driven infrastructure and why a holistic approach is the key to making it all work.

From energy demands to smarter systems, the future of data looks very different—and it’s happening now.

Innovation doesn’t start with technology – it starts with people. 🤝 

In fiscal 2025, over 50,000 brilliant minds came together across our R&D team to imagine what’s next. 

But our story goes deeper: 5,300, 2,600, 6.6 billion… and 1. What do these numbers tell in our R&D story? 👀

Our President and CEO @roland.busch will take the keynote stage at #CES2026, the world’s leading industrial technology event. 

📅 January 6, 2026 
⏰8:30 a.m. Pacific Time 
📍CES, Las Vegas! 

We’re showcasing the next era of #IndustrialAI – where digital twins, AI, and automation connect the real and digital worlds. From factories to data centers, we’re unveiling tech that transforms how the world designs, builds, and runs industry.

node.text:
From the first electric locomotives to fully digital trains, rail is in its biggest transformation in 100 years. 🚄

Michael Peter, CEO of @siemens_mobility, shares why #Simulation and #Data are the foundation for #AI to drive the next leap forward.
As the world expands transport capacity with fewer emissions, these technologies aren’t just an advantage—they’re essential.

The result: technology leadership that unites performance with #sustainability and keeps the industry ahead of the curve. 
And we’re right on track! ✅

node.text:
🚛 50+ electric trucks. 100% renewable energy.

People said:
• “Batteries can’t handle long-haul.”
• “There’s no charging network.”
• “Charging takes forever.”

But real-world results are proving those doubts wrong. 

@speditionnannojanssen is demonstrating how electric long-haul transport works — today. With our high-power charging in Northern Germany, their fleet runs efficiently without straining the grid.⚡

node.text:
This International Men’s Day, we’re shining a light on fatherhood at Siemens.

Chris recently returned from parental leave, embracing the joys and challenges of being a new dad. 

Fatherhood at work looks different for everyone—what does it mean to you? Drop your thoughts below! 👇

#InternationalMensDay #DadLife #LifeAtSiemens

node.text:
🤖 The future of manufacturing is humanoid.
We’re showcasing the Unitree G1 #HumanoidRobot as a next-gen platform for advanced industrial capabilities:

• Mobility & dexterity powered by @nvidia AI
• 360° perception with LiDAR + depth cameras
• Natural-language collaboration as a true “physical co-pilot”

More than automation – this is intelligent collaboration driving the next era of industrial innovation.

node.text:
Together with 49 Siemens delegates, Sarah joined more than 2,000 young leaders from around the world at #OYW25 in Munich to connect, learn, and turn ideas into action. She took part in inspiring keynotes, panels, and workshops on this year’s themes from Circular Economy to, Responsible Tech.

Join her for a glimpse into what the summit was all about!

#ScalingSustainabilityImpact

node.text:
We’re entering our next stage of growth🚀 

Our CEO @roland.busch shared how we’re shaping the future at the Siemens ONE Tech - Strategy & Results event in Munich 

#AI is a major growth driver for us, helping us innovate faster, build smarter products, and create breakthroughs like the Industrial Foundation Model and AI agents for industry. Siemens develops AI for the real world. 

With unmatched industrial data, deep domain expertise, and global partners like @Microsoft, @amazonwebservices, @Google, @NVIDIA, we’re ready to lead Industrial AI. 

And this is just the start.

node.text:
🌍 Behind the scenes at Web Summit in Lisbon! 
 
Join Peter Koerte, our MBM CTO & CSO, and Rev Lebaredian, VP of Omniverse & Simulation Technology at NVIDIA, as they take the stage to share how our companies are shaping the future of intelligent industry.

From reliable trains to sustainable buildings, industrial AI is transforming our world. Together we're building the backbone for the new AI era 🚀

node.text:
Driving innovation in the real and digital world jointly with @Audi! 🚗💨

AUDI's production line did not get just one but TWO upgrades from our #SiemensXcelerator portfolio:
#AI-powered weld splatter detection
The world's first failsafe virtual PLC
This means faster response to market changes and more efficient operations.

It's intelligent, software-defined manufacturing that's transforming how cars are made!

Every great recipe starts with the right ingredients. 🍲

Together with Kotányi, we’ve blended tradition with technology to keep delivering flavor across 32 countries. By modernizing its production with the help of data, smart systems, and predictive maintenance.

The result?

✅ Fewer disruptions
✅ Greater transparency
✅ Reliable delivery — without compromising on quality

Because when every detail matters, it’s not just about what you make — it’s about how you make it.

node.text:
Feeling productive? We sure are!

Last year, we filed 5,300 invention disclosures—that’s about 24 fresh ideas every workday. 🤯

And no, it’s not one genius on five espressos—it’s 53,000 innovators collaborating, creating, and still finding time to chill on the weekends. 😎

node.text:
AI: ally or threat? 🤖🔒 With a cyberattack every 39 seconds, how do we defend against the most advanced attackers? 
#Cybersecurity Awareness Month may be behind us, but staying secure is a year-round commitment.

node.text:
♻️ The oil left over from your fries helps power #IndustrialAutomation!

Here’s how it works:

1️⃣ Envalior converts used cooking oil into bio-based plastic granulates through a certified mass-balance process.
2️⃣ The result is a durable, heat- and chemical-resistant, halogen-free plastic made from renewable biomass (Akulon® K225-KS B-MB).
3️⃣ At our plant, this bio-based material is used for molding housing and cover parts.
4️⃣The housing and covers are assembled into the new SIRIUS 3RQ4 coupling relays.

The result: a more sustainable electrical product that works efficiently while meeting our strict Siemens EcoTech label criteria.

node.text:
There's a new tower on Dubai's skyline ... and it's packed with fresh greens! 🌱

Meet Bustanica in Dubai, one of the world's largest vertical farms, powered by our technology.

From the Siemens Xcelerator portfolio, our Simatic automation, Desigo CC, and Sinamics drives are making this agricultural revolution possible. 

We’re helping to build a greener future, literally from the ground up!

#Sustainability #Innovation #Digitalization #SiemensXcelerator

node.text:
Peter Koerte, our MBM, CTO & CSO joined Rev from @NVIDIA at #NVIDIAGTC to spotlight how our partnership is shaping the future of industry.
 
Together, we’re combining deep industrial expertise with advanced AI and accelerated computing — helping our customers become more resilient, sustainable, and competitive.
 
AI is everywhere — and we’re proud to be leading the way. 🚀

The future of manufacturing just got a major upgrade at @nvidia GTC.

With NVIDIA we plan to reindustrialize America through next-generation infrastructure. Combining accelerated computing, AI-enabled digital twins, intelligent automation, and resilient energy systems.

From chip design to AI-powered data centers, we're empowering manufacturers to build smarter, faster, and more sustainable operations. #NVIDIAGTC

node.text:
What does 60,000 people look like? 🤔 

It's the equivalent of roughly:
• A sold-out Emirates Stadium in London, UK
• The population of Palo Alto, California, U.S.
• Enough people to fill 1,000 buses – that’s a convoy stretching for nearly 16 km, enough to circle a city like Singapore’s Marina Bay area!

And… it’s the number of brilliant minds making up our global R&D team.

Nestled among snow-dusted peaks, Hotel Hochschober is setting new standards in sustainable hospitality🏨⛰️

 📍Located at 1,763 meters above sea level, this premium hotel collaborated with us to transform their entire energy systems in just 6 weeks. 

The results speak for themselves:
• Nearly 1,000 MWh of district heating saved annually
• 190 MWh of electrical energy reduced yearly
• 390 tons of CO2 emissions eliminated per year

All seamlessly managed by our Desigo CC smart building platform, ensuring optimal comfort and efficiency.

At this cozy alpine retreat, sustainable innovation climbs to new heights✨

🌱 What if you could transform agricultural waste into compostable plastics? 

We are supporting innovative PlantSwitch to do just that; enabling a soil-to-soil, circular process. Addressing the microplastic challenge, one compostable product at a time.

node.text:
Your favorite snacks just got smarter! 🍫 

We've partnered with @mondelez_international to speed up productivity while reducing downtime and maintenance efforts.
How? Through our comprehensive approach combining: 
• Four core applications 
• Azure-based #IoT platform 
• Change management expertise 
• IT/OT integration 

What started in four plants is soon scaling to over 20 facilities worldwide. 🌍🌎🌏

Green buildings are built to save energy, but even the best need a check-up. 🌱 

At UTSC, we spotted a few inefficiencies hiding in plain sight. So we teamed up, dug into the data, and made smart changes.
Now? 1,100 tonnes of CO₂e saved every year and 33% less natural gas used.

Big impact, small tweaks that’s the power of collaboration. 💡

“Nothing beats an @Airbus holiday!” That’s why we’ve teamed up to decarbonize its UK and U.S. industrial sites – cutting energy use by 20% and reducing emissions by 85% by 2030.

With renewable energy, smart energy management and low-carbon heat systems (and support from @capgemini), we’re helping Airbus to reach their overall target of abating 80 kilotons of CO₂ equivalent every year from 2030 – the same as taking 18,000 cars off the road. 🚗💨

Because the best kind of holiday? One that’s good for the planet. 🌍✈️

node.text:
Ready to reboot? 💻

The Cyber Phantom breached the core, grinning: “Patch this, if you can!”
But we weren’t playing around. Armed with a quantum patch and a cyber purge pulse, our hero struck back.
💥 KABOOM!

Phantom defeated. Resilience unlocked. 🔓🛡️

One startup had a dream: to turn arid soil fertile 💧🌱

Norwegian startup @Desert_Control created the breakthrough Liquid Natural Clay (LNC®) that transforms degraded soils into fertile, water-retaining environments for agriculture.

With mobile production units, LNC® is now deployed worldwide — addressing water scarcity and land degradation while building resilience for both people and planet.

#Sustainability #Innovation #StartUp

node.text:
Welcome to our crib! 
👑 Once a neoclassical palace, now our stomping ground. Since 1949, the Palais Ludwig Ferdinand in #Munich has been our headquarters.

Today, this historic building is still part of a hub of global #Innovation – doubling as a unique event space, restaurant, gym, and offices.

node.text:
Greener fields. Higher yields. Smarter water use. 🌱💧 At #ClimateWeekNYC, James Thomas, CEO of Desert Control, shared how we help them to scale up their innovative Liquid Natural Clay solution.

#ScalingSustainabilityImpact

Siemens + @ducaticorse = a 1st place partnership 🏍️ 🤝🥇

How does this multi-domain team keep racing ahead of the competition to create sustainable, safe and powerful racing and street motorcycles? With a winning combo of tools for simulation, design and analytics — all available in the #SiemensXcelerator portfolio. 🏆🏁
Find out all the details at the link in our bio. 🔗

#Ducati #motorsport #Motorcycle #Racing

node.text:
We teamed up with The @bayerischestaatsoper to turn acoustics into an immersive digital experience. 🎭✨

Together, we’ve created a #DigitalTwin of Bavaria’s National Theater making acoustics, stage setups, and orchestral arrangements fully immersive in mixed reality.

Ready to hear the future? 🎶

Concert venues are entering their green era 🌟🌱🍃 

In an industry where buildings account for roughly 40% of total energy use, it's important for venues to balance performance with energy efficiency.
 
Building X, from our #SiemensXcelerator portfolio, is the mastermind behind entertainment spaces that sparkle like midnight while cutting carbon footprints. 
 
Our open-source digital platform offers real-time access control, visitor management, and occupancy-based systems that optimize heating, cooling, and ventilation automatically based on crowd size.

With cybercrime remaining a major challenge, raising awareness is essential. As AI introduces new vulnerabilities, it's crucial to act. The @worldeconomicforum says: while AI is seen as a cybersecurity game-changer, many overlook essential security checks.

This #CybersecurityAwarenessMonth, let's change the narrative! As AI evolves, securing it is more important than ever. 🤖🛡️
Remember, cybersecurity is not just an add-on; it's the prerequisite and enabler for true innovation.

From thrilling rides to seamless operations – our tech keeps #Oktoberfest spinning. 🎡
With smart drives, advanced safety systems, and up to 40% less energy use, we make sure fun is not only exciting but also efficient and sustainable. 🍻

node.text:
The Baltics' largest and greenest data center is now online 🛜

This Greenergy facility uses #AI-powered cooling to achieve remarkable energy efficiency while maintaining the highest security standards. 

With 3,000+ sensors monitored 24/7 and multiple redundant power systems, it's built to never fail.

Greenergy is ready for the #DigitalTwin revolution and setting new standards with intelligent building technologies.

The future of data is green, secure and powered by #SiemensXcelerator

While millions celebrate at #Oktoberfest, our technology is working behind the scenes. 🍻

Behind every perfect pour, automation keeps the taps running – keeping beer flowing smoothly, ensuring consistent quality, and resource savings of up to 33%.

200,000 square meters.
€500 million invested.
1 foundation for excellence.

We have broken ground on the first 7,000 sqm of our new Technology Campus Erlangen, where we are building the foundation for the industrial metaverse in the real world – right here in Germany. 🇩🇪 

The campus will focus on sustainable and future-oriented high-tech manufacturing, related research and development activities.

node.text:
Next level: The Dark Grid
 
The Blackout Beast loomed large, whispering with a smirk: "Aren’t blackouts oh so romantic?" 🖤
But our hero wasn’t swayed by darkness. With a swift Energy Scan Blast and a dazzling Grid Harmony Strike...

💥💡 BOOM! 💡💥
 
The lights came on.
The chaos faded.
The transformation? Complete. 🏆
#Innovation #DigtialTransformation #SmartGrid

Big news from the track! 🏁 We're now the @fia.official Official Digital Twin Sponsor, a key part of their Global Partnership Programme. We'll be helping to shape how race cars are designed, before they even hit the track 🏎️

Our #SiemensXcelerator portfolio will be used to design, test, and refine aerodynamic concepts. This means fewer physical prototypes and less wind tunnel testing, directly reducing environmental impact and accelerating the FIA's journey to net zero by 2030. 🍃

We're so excited to see how this partnership pushes #Motorsport forward!

What goes into your favorite Oktoberfest beer? 🍺

At Hofbräu München, it’s more than hops and malt — it’s centuries of tradition, precision, and smart automation.
Faced with outdated systems and low transparency, Hofbräuturned to BRAUMAT, powered by #SiemensXcelerator.
BRAUMAT automates, optimizes, and scales brewing with:
🔧 Scalable automation
📊 Real-time transparency
⚡ Intelligent control for higher efficiency
 
With Siemens Xcelerator, Hofbräu has transformed its brewing process — combining centuries of craftsmanship with cutting-edge technology to deliver consistent quality at scale.
#Oktoberfest #HofbräuMünchen #DigitalTransformation

node.text:
🚢 Why do ships keep their smokestacks running in port?
They need electricity. And without a grid connection, they rely on diesel generators.

We changed that. SIHARBOR delivers clean shore power to even the largest vessels.

In Kiel, Germany, our facility already provides up to 16 MW of power. It saves 12,000 tons of CO₂ every year.

Just a few hours on shore power can cut as much particulate pollution as thousands of cars driving 1,000 km.

node.text:
History didn’t roll in quietly here it rumbled in on steel tracks. 🚇
Werner von Siemens pitched the future in 1880.

Berlin said no. But bold ideas don’t vanish, they wait.📍Near Oberbaumbrücke, Germany’s first electrified elevated railway took off.

19 million riders in year one. Still riding it today? You’re part of that legacy.

node.text:
Lady Legacy appeared, cloaked in outdated systems and resistant to change. 🕰️ “You’ll never escape the past,” she warned. 

But our hero was ready. With an agile blast and a powerful innovation beam, the fortress crumbled. 💥

Obsolete processes? Defeated. 
Transformation? Achieved. 🏆

Long before your first video call, we were already connecting continents. 🌎 

In 1875, the Siemens brothers Werner, William, and Carl tackled one of the greatest engineering challenges of their time, laying a telegraph cable across the vast Atlantic Ocean floor. 🌊 

Our specially designed ship "Faraday" successfully connected Ireland to North America. Joining the early pioneers of this revolutionary technology that allowed messages to travel between continents in minutes instead of weeks.

This transatlantic cable wasn't just a cable, it was a global information network that transformed how people connected across vast distances.

The "Faraday" went on to lay an estimated 50,000 nautical miles of cable during its remarkable 50-year service life.

#ClimateTech #Sustainability #Innovation #AI

450 years of care. Now, a leap into the future. 

Hospital de Nervión in #Sevilla 🇪🇸 just got a smart upgrade thanks to tech that makes buildings more #efficient, resilient, and healing. ❤️‍🩹

35% cost savings 
#Sustainable design 
A space that supports patients, staff, and the planet.

This is what happens when legends evolve. 🚀
